content.speakerText: Thanks again for showing me how to use the copier!
content.speakerTextCn: 再次谢谢你教我用复印机！

options.text: Anytime! Just holler if you need help again.
I'm busy right now, so I can't help you.
You're welcome, but I don't want to do it again.
Don't mention it. I hate teaching people.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime! Just holler if you need help again.' 是礼貌且开放的回应，鼓励对方未来再次求助，符合道别时营造友好氛围的语境。干扰项均带有负面或冷漠语气，不符合职场礼貌道别的规范。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me finish this report.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我完成这份报告。

options.text: No worries! Let me know if you need a hand next time.
Yeah, whatever. I had nothing else to do.
You should have done it yourself.
Thanks, but I'm done with helping now.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了非正式但友好的表达 'No worries!' 和开放性邀请 'let me know if you need a hand next time'，符合礼貌道别场景。其他选项语气粗鲁、消极或带有拒绝意味，不符合职场友好互动原则。

content.speakerText: You were so helpful with the printing setup!
content.speakerTextCn: 你帮了我很大的忙，解决了打印设置的问题！

options.text: Glad I could help! Feel free to ask anytime.
It was easy, anyone could do it.
I did it because I was bored.
I hope you don't need help again—I'm swamped.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Glad I could help! Feel free to ask anytime.' 表达了积极、开放和鼓励的态度，是地道的礼貌道别方式。干扰项要么贬低帮助行为，要么暗示不愿再帮忙，违背了友好结束对话的语用目的。

content.template: Thanks for helping me! ______ if you need help again.
content.hint: 这是非正式但友好的表达，常用于同事间轻松互动
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：just holler（口语化邀请求助）

content.hint: 这是鼓励对方时的常用句型，强调当前表现
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：you're doing great（表扬正在进行的行为）

content.template: Glad I could help! ______ to ask if you need anything.
content.hint: 这是礼貌邀请对方再次求助的标准表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：feel free to do（鼓励自由行动的礼貌用语）

content.speakerText: Thanks again for showing me how to use the copier!
content.speakerTextCn: 再次谢谢你教我用复印机！
expectedAnswers: Anytime! Just holler if you need help again.
Sure thing! Don't hesitate to ask if you get stuck later.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了愿意继续提供帮助的开放态度
语言准确性：语法是否正确，是否使用了恰当的口语表达
表达自然度：是否符合职场轻松友好的语境，避免生硬或冷漠
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'holler', 'ask', 'help', 'need' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you walking me through the printer settings.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你带我熟悉了打印机的设置。
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Feel free to reach out anytime.
Glad I could help! Let me know if anything else comes up.
No worries at all—I'm happy to help whenever you need.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否传达了乐意再次协助的积极态度
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'feel free', 'reach out', 'let me know' 等表达
表达自然度：是否避免了机械重复或过于正式的措辞
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'help', 'need', 'ask', 'anytime' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Thanks for showing me the shortcut to copy double-sided!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你教我双面复印的快捷方式！
expectedAnswers: My pleasure! You'll be a pro in no time.
Anytime! That shortcut saves so much time—I use it all the time.
Happy to help! Let me know if you want to learn more tricks.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了友好道别并鼓励未来互动
语言准确性：是否使用了自然的口语结构和正确时态
表达自然度：是否体现了真实职场中的轻松互动语气
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'help', 'anytime', 'let me know', 'shortcut' 等相关词汇
